title: lepia sativa
intro: Lepia sativa, also known as the field horsetail or common horsetail, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Equisetaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Lepia sativa include its ability to improve respiratory health, boost energy levels, and support bone health due to its high silica content. Lepia sativa can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
